news.t: JPMorgan Asset Management Launches Fundamental Data Science ETF Suite on Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: SCDS is an equity ETF with a total of 265 individual holdings. The top holdings are CASH stock at 4.82%, Bloom Energy at 2.19%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 1.76%, TTM Technologies at 1.65%, and DigitalOcean Holdings at 1.65%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Fundamental Data Science Small Core ETF (SCDS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund actively selects components using a fundamental based approach, picking US small caps. SCDS was launched on Aug 7, 2024 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: JPMorgan Asset Management Launches Fundamental Data Science ETF Suite on Nasdaq
data.text: Funds leverage advanced data insights NEW YORK , Aug. 8, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management (JPMAM) today announced the launch of the JPMorgan Fundamental Data Science (FDS) Suite on th...
